title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at MobiKwik - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!
